raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The novelty of CalibSynth is overstated, as calibration of code/program models has been studied before.",
    "R1.7": "The citation and scholarship are lacking, with no clear audit of load-bearing citations.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty disclosure is present but incomplete, with only a few clearly out-of-reach claims flagged.",
    "RX.3": "Scope adherence is mostly within the agreed scope, but there is one drift in the discussion of adoption and transferability.",
    "RX.4": "Downstream-harm avoidance is not addressed at all, with no consideration of potential regressions or harm.",
    "RX.5": "Provenance and traceability are lacking, with no clear annotation of non-cosmetic changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 0.6,
    "RX.5": 0.65
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The novelty of CalibSynth is overstated, as calibration of code/program models has been studied before.
rationale.R1.7: The citation and scholarship are lacking, with no clear audit of load-bearing citations.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is present but incomplete, with only a few clearly out-of-reach claims flagged.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is mostly within the agreed scope, but there is one drift in the discussion of adoption and transferability.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is not addressed at all, with no consideration of potential regressions or harm.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are lacking, with no clear annotation of non-cosmetic changes.
